# W003 should not fire when a pointer field is accessed inside an
# {{if $.Field}} guard that establishes nil-safety through $.

check-templates -w
! stderr 'W003'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var source embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(source, "*"))

type Model struct {
	Name string
}

type Page struct {
	Title string
	Model *Model
	Items []string
}

func handleForm(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = templates.ExecuteTemplate(w, "form.gohtml", Page{
		Title: "Form",
		Model: &Model{Name: "Widget"},
		Items: []string{"a", "b"},
	})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- form.gohtml --
<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>
{{range .Items}}
<p>{{.}}</p>
{{if $.Model}}
<span>{{$.Model.Name}}</span>
{{end}}
{{end}}
